zh.lifeSummary: 當Eduard de Bar III於1378年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson13歲，母親Marie de Coucy12歲。他於1413年8月與Jeanne de Bethune在法國奧維普-德-o米奧結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年10月25日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒阿吉古特享年37歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eduard de Bar III于1378年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson13岁，母亲Marie de Coucy12岁。他于1413年8月与Jeanne de Bethune在法国奧維普-德-o米奧结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1415年10月25日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒阿吉古特享年37岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Eduard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Eduardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

variants.name: Eideard
meanings: Gaelic equivalent of Edward .

variants.name: Édouard

variants.name: Edvard

en.lifeSummary: When Eduard de Bar III was born in 1378, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson, was 13 and his mother, Marie de Coucy, was 12. He married Jeanne de Bethune in August 1413, in Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 25 October 1415, in Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 37, and was buried in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eduard de Bar III est né en 1378, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Marie de Coucy, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Bethune en août 1413, à Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 octobre 1415, à Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eduard de Bar III 1378 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson 13 und seine Mutter Marie de Coucy 12. Er hat im August 1413 in Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Frankreich Jeanne de Bethune geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Oktober 1415 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eduard de Bar III è nato il nel 1378 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Coucy, aveva 12 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Bethune nel agosto 1413, nel Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 25 ottobre 1415, nel Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eduard de Bar IIIが1378年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Moussonは13歳，母Marie de Coucyは12歳であった。1413年8月にフランスアウバーグンプウイ-デ-ドoメメアウックスでJeanne de Bethuneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年10月25日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルアジンコウルトで37歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eduard de Bar III(이)가 1378년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Coucy(은)는 12세였다. 그는 1413년 8월 프랑스 오버그니 푸이-데-드o 모스에서 Jeanne de Bethune(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 10월 25일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 아긴쿠르트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eduard de Bar III nasceu em 1378, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Coucy, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Bethune em agosto de 1413, em Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de outubro de 1415, em Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eduard de Bar III родился в 1378 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Coucy, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Bethune август 1413 г. в местности мокс, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргн, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 25 октября 1415 г. в местности агинкоурт, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eduard de Bar III nació en 1378, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Henri de Bar, Marquis de Pont-a-Mousson, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Marie de Coucy, tenía 12 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Bethune en agosto de 1413, en Meaux, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 25 de octubre de 1415, en Agincourt, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
